A.code:
import sys
import re
from collections import defaultdict

log = sys.argv[1]
counts = defaultdict(int)
for line in log.splitlines():
    m = re.match(r'(\S+) \S+ \S+ \[.*?\] ".*?" (\d+)', line)
    if m:
        ip, status = m.group(1), m.group(2)
        if status.startswith('4'):
            counts[ip] += 1
best = max(counts, key=lambda k: counts[k])
sys.stdout.write(f"{best}\t{counts[best]}\n")

B.code:
(set logs (argv))
(set counts {})
(for-each log logs
  (set parts (split log " "))
  (if (and (ge (len parts) 9) (gt (last parts) "399"))
    (set ip (first parts))
    (map_arr parts (\p (println p)))
    (set count (get_or counts ip 0))
    (set counts (json_set counts [ip] (add count 1)))))
(println (fmt "{}\t{}\n" (first (sort_by (entries counts) (\e (neg (last e))))) (last (first (sort_by (entries counts) (\e (neg (last e))))))))

A.code:
import sys
import csv
from io import StringIO
from collections import defaultdict

data = sys.argv[1]
reader = csv.DictReader(StringIO(data))
totals = defaultdict(float)
for row in reader:
    totals[row['category']] += float(row['amount'])
top3 = sorted(totals.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)[:3]
for cat, total in top3:
    sys.stdout.write(f"{cat}: ${total:.2f}\n")

B.code:
(set rows (split $0 "\n"))
(set data (map_arr (slice rows 1 (len rows)) (\r (split r ","))))
(set sums {})
(for-each row data
  (set category (first row))
  (set amount (float (last row)))
  (if (in category sums)
    (set sums (json_set sums [category] (add (json_get sums [category]) amount)))
    (else (set sums (json_set sums [category] amount)))))
(set entries (sort_by (entries sums) (\e (neg (last e)))))
(for-each entry (slice entries 0 3)
  (println (fmt "{}: ${:.2f}" (first entry) (last entry))))

import sys
import re

source = sys.argv[1]
for line in source.splitlines():
    m = re.match(r'def (\w+)\(', line)
    if m:
        sys.stdout.write(m.group(1) + '\n')

A.code:
import sys

data = sys.argv[1]
lines = data.strip().split('\n')
rows = [line.split('\t') for line in lines]
header = rows[0]
divider = ['---'] * len(header)
all_rows = [header, divider] + rows[1:]
result = ''
for row in all_rows:
    result += '| ' + ' | '.join(row) + ' |\n'
sys.stdout.write(result)

    (array_get fields 1)
    (array_get fields 2))))

A.code:
import sys
from collections import defaultdict

data = sys.argv[1]
counts = defaultdict(int)
for line in data.strip().split('\n'):
    parts = line.split(' ', 2)
    if len(parts) >= 2 and parts[1] == 'ERROR':
        hour = parts[0].split('T')[1].split(':')[0]
        counts[hour] += 1
best = max(counts, key=lambda h: counts[h])
sys.stdout.write(best + '\n')

(set logs (split $0 "\n"))
(set counts {})
(for-each log logs
  (set parts (split log " "))
  (if (eq (first parts) "ERROR")
    (let ts (join (slice parts 1 4) ""))
    (let hour (string_slice ts 11 2))
    (map_arr counts (\v (add v 1)))))
(set max_hour "")
(set max_count 0)
(for-each k string (map_keys counts)
  (if (gt (map_get counts k) max_count)
    (set max_hour k)
    (set max_count (map_get counts k))))
(println (fmt "{}\n" max_hour))

A.code:
import sys
lines = sys.argv[1].split('\n')
out = ''
for line in lines:
    if line.strip():
        parts = line.split()
        out += parts[1] + ' ' + parts[2] + '\n'
sys.stdout.write(out)
